inputs.label: Total Rise (Floor-to-Floor Height)
inputs.businessContext: The total vertical height between finished floor levels.

inputs.label: Total Run Available
inputs.businessContext: The total horizontal distance available for the staircase.

inputs.label: Maximum Riser Height (Code)
inputs.businessContext: The maximum allowed riser height as per local building regulations.

inputs.label: Minimum Tread Depth (Code)
inputs.businessContext: The minimum required tread depth (going) as per local building regulations.

inputs.label: Desired Riser Height
inputs.businessContext: The preferred riser height for comfort, typically between 150-190 mm.

inputs.label: Nosing Overhang
inputs.businessContext: The distance the tread extends beyond the riser face. Used for precise tread dimensioning.

formulas.primaryOutput: 'Rise: ' + actualRiser.toFixed(1) + ' mm, Tread: ' + treadDepth.toFixed(1) + ' mm, Steps: ' + numSteps
